output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?person(COUNT(?superbowl) AS ?count) WHERE {
  ?person wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  ?person wdt:P2522 ?superbowl .
  ?superbowl rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , "super bowl"))
  .
}
GROUP BY ?person
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 1
